brandHeader.title: IGAVI DEVELOPMENT
brandHeader.subtitle: Igavi Development is a real estate development company in Georgia creating high-standard residential ecosystems designed for modern, conscious, and sustainable living.

hero.subtitle: Discover premium villas designed for refined modern living, nestled in the heart of the city.

slogan.line1: Breathe freely, live in harmony with nature

about.desc1: Our philosophy is built on a powerful idea: a residential environment should be an allegory of life — a place where every resident is the main character, and the space becomes part of their personal story.
about.desc2: Our mission is to establish European-standard, environmentally responsible, and self-sufficient residential developments in Georgia that respond to the challenges of contemporary urban living.

services.card1Desc: An eco-friendly residential environment nestled in greenery — a unique setting where residents feel comfortable and in harmony.
services.card2Desc: A place where champions train and are born. Choose your sport and sports complex or court
services.card3Desc: Explore the diverse infrastructure of a European-standard hippodrome, including the equestrian club.

olimpo.aptStudioDesc: Compact and functional living space, ideal for investment or personal use.
olimpo.aptSemiStandardDesc: Comfortable layout with optimized space for modern living.
olimpo.aptNonStandardDesc: Unique floor plans with distinctive architectural solutions.
olimpo.aptPenthouseDesc: Premium top-floor residences with panoramic views and exclusive amenities.
olimpo.advantagesIntro: Enjoy Olimpo's multi-functional sports and wellness infrastructure, with recreation, entertainment, and leisure spaces.
olimpo.descriptionDefault:
Olimpo — Georgia's first largest and most multi-functional sports complex.

Professional athletes and guests are welcomed by a 5-star hotel, football, tennis, volleyball, padel and other courts, swimming pools, a sports hall, a sports & wellness center and a wellness spa.

It's a place for professional athletes and sports enthusiasts alike — where future champions train and grow.
olimpo.visionTextDefault: Olimpo is one of Georgia's most extensive sports and wellness spaces. Built to European standards, the multi-functional sports complex unites a wide range of disciplines. At Olimpo you can pursue several sports in a single location — at amateur or professional level.
olimpo.clubBenefitsText:
• Several stadiums built to UEFA standards
• Tennis courts
• Padel courts
• Beach volleyball court
• 5-star Olympiad hotel
• Indoor and outdoor pools
• Rehabilitation medical center
• Fitness hall
• Ping-pong tables
• Billiards and more.

Wellness Center — a premium-class wellness center is yet another highlight of Olimpo. A medical-diagnostic, rehabilitation and wellness facility where guests can undergo a wide range of wellness, treatment and rehabilitation procedures, including practices from Eastern medicine.

Hotel — guests of the 5-star hotel are welcomed by comfortable contemporary rooms, a restaurant serving exquisite Georgian, European and Asian dishes, indoor swimming pools, a fitness hall, ping-pong tables, billiards and more.

ipodromi.title: Hippodrome
ipodromi.descriptionDefault:
A unique, large-scale, multi-functional hippodrome built to European standards on several hectares for 120 horses. A place where caring for the horse is a priority.

Everything here is set up so friends and family can spend the entire day together: cafés and bars, restaurants, picnic spots and entertainment areas.

We organize private and corporate events — signing ceremonies, wedding photo shoots, birthday celebrations, corporate team-building, and more.
ipodromi.visionTextDefault:
The Equestrian Club is a private, elite club: membership is by invitation only or by a current member's recommendation.

Members enjoy unlimited access to the infrastructure and services across Olimpo and the Hippodrome.

Membership in Polograph's Equestrian Club is a unique, premium-class status grounded in European tradition.
ipodromi.joinDescriptionDefault:
Equestrian sport enthusiasts and amateurs can train at the riding school on the Hippodrome grounds. The site features several open arenas where we prepare future Olympic champions in disciplines such as show jumping, dressage and eventing.

Equestrian sport and time spent with horses have a particularly positive effect on people. The benefits are even greater for children and young people — there's no doubt that horse riding plays a unique role in healthy development.
ipodromi.equestrianClubDescription: The Hippodrome's equestrian club offers riding lessons, personal horse care, and exclusive club membership.

polograph.descriptionDefault:
Polograph, a project by Igavi Development, is one of the region's most large-scale and unique residential complexes.

Polograph offers an exclusive lifestyle where nature and comfort blend in harmony. A residential setting laid out across dozens of hectares, elegantly arranged — 279 premium-class villas designed individually with refined detail.

A 20-minute drive from Tbilisi, on elevated, specially landscaped grounds set above the central highway, with breathtaking panoramic views from every vantage point.

Polograph's eco-friendly residential environment is distinguished by unique greenery, an abundance of parks and a private lake. The natural cover wraps around the site as a boulevard — with walking and running paths, rest areas and many varieties of trees and plants.

In the forest park, unique trees and plants brought from Georgia and from around the world have been planted specifically for Polograph — species particularly suited to a residential setting.

Sakura Avenue — the inner streets of Polograph are lined with sakura trees in different colors, creating a mesmerizing pink gradient in the spring.

For residents who prefer to relax by the water, Polograph offers its own lake — within walking distance of the villas.

The Round Garden — Polograph's refined central plaza: featuring a striking fountain, rest areas, children's play zones, cafés and bars, restaurants, sports grounds and an amphitheater.

The Polograph complex offers a modern, comfortable business center and office spaces. Diverse infrastructure and entertainment venues make it possible to host a wide range of corporate events.

Residents who prefer air travel can use Polograph's private helipad.
polograph.visionTextDefault: Polograph's philosophy is to build and develop a unique, eco-friendly residential environment in harmony with nature — where greenery, fresh air, a healthy lifestyle and inner creative freedom are the everyday reality of its residents.
polograph.helicopterBannerDesc: Quick access to Tbilisi and other regions of Georgia from our own helicopter aerodrome.
polograph.framePartitionsDesc: Plastered, whitened interior partitions, following pre-agreed project.
polograph.frameFloorDesc: Prepared for laying floor or parquet.
polograph.frameUtilitiesDesc: Electrical wiring, plumbing, and heating pipes routed to appropriate points.
polograph.frameFacadeDesc: Completed exterior finishing and ready balconies.

seo.defaultDescription: Discover luxury villas by Igavi Development in Georgia — premium residential ecosystems with modern design, stunning views, and world-class infrastructure.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains how Igavi Development ("Company", "we") collects, uses, and shares information when you interact with our advertisements, websites, or services, and provides you with information about your rights under Georgian legislation and international data protection standards (including the EU General Data Protection Regulation – GDPR).
privacy.consent: By using our services, you consent to the collection and use of data as described in this policy.
privacy.termCompany: Company — Igavi Development, its subsidiaries and partner companies.
privacy.termService: Service — our advertisements, websites, applications, and related activities.
privacy.termPersonalData: Personal Data — any information related to an identified or identifiable person.
privacy.termUsageData: Usage Data — information automatically collected by the service (e.g., IP address, browser type, pages viewed).
privacy.termDevice: Device — any device using the service (computer, smartphone, tablet).
privacy.termServiceProvider: Service Provider — third-party partners supporting our service.
privacy.termYou: You — the individual using the service, or the legal entity on whose behalf the individual uses the service.
privacy.dataId: Identification data: first name, last name.
privacy.dataPreferences: Preferences and requirements: voluntarily provided information.
privacy.dataUsage: Usage data: IP address, browser, time spent on site, cookies and tracking identifiers.
privacy.legalBasisIntro: We process personal data only if:
privacy.legalConsent: Consent — you have given explicit consent (e.g., to receive marketing communications).
privacy.legalContract: Contract — processing is necessary to fulfill a contract with you.
privacy.legalInterest: Legitimate interest — improving service, ensuring security, promoting offers (considering your rights).
privacy.dataUseIntro: We use personal data for the following purposes:
privacy.dataSharingIntro: Your information may be shared with:
privacy.dataShare5: When required by law (courts, government agencies).
privacy.dataShare6: With your consent for other purposes.
privacy.retention1: Contract data — 5 years after end of relationship.
privacy.retention3: Legal obligations — period defined by law.
privacy.retention4: Usage data — short-term, except for security or analysis needs.
privacy.transferIntro: Personal data may be transferred outside Georgia to countries with adequate protection mechanisms:
privacy.right6: File a complaint with Georgia's Personal Data Protection Service.
privacy.securityText: We use appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect data, although no one can guarantee complete security.
privacy.minorsText: The service is not intended for persons under 18. If it is discovered that a minor has provided data, please contact us for deletion.
privacy.thirdPartyText: Our service may contain links to external websites whose privacy we are not responsible for.
privacy.changesText: We may update the privacy policy. Changes take effect upon publication.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.generalText: These terms govern your use of Igavi Development's website and services. By using the website, you agree to these terms.
terms.serviceText: Igavi Development provides information about the company's projects, real estate, and services through the website. The company reserves the right to modify, suspend, or terminate any part of the service at any time.
terms.ipText: All materials on the website, including text, images, logos, designs, and other content, are the intellectual property of Igavi Development and are protected by Georgian law.
terms.obligation1: Do not use the website for illegal purposes.
terms.obligation2: Do not modify, copy, or distribute website content without permission.
terms.obligation3: Provide accurate information when filling out contact forms.
terms.liabilityText: Igavi Development is not responsible for any damages that may result from the use or unavailability of the website. Information on the website is presented on an "as is" basis.
terms.thirdPartyText: The website may contain links to third-party websites. The company is not responsible for the content or privacy policies of these websites.
terms.changesText: The company reserves the right to update these terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on the website.
terms.lawText: These terms are governed by Georgian law. Any disputes shall be resolved by the competent courts of Georgia.

cookie.message: Our website uses cookies to improve your experience. By continuing, you agree to our privacy policy.
